description.id: Profesional Continuous Improvement dengan pengalaman langsung di operasional manufaktur. Spesialisasi optimasi proses berbasis data dan lean methodology. Terbukti menghasilkan efisiensi terukur melalui dashboard interaktif di Kraft Heinz dan analisis 10.000+ rekord data di Narasio Data.
description.en: Continuous Improvement professional with hands-on experience in manufacturing and industrial operations. Specializing in data-driven process optimization and lean methodologies. Proven track record of delivering measurable efficiency gains through interactive dashboards at Kraft Heinz and 10,000+ record data analysis at Narasio Data.
